settings.heading: RBP marketplace
settings.text: Available partner offers, seller resources and marketplace terms with clear eligibility and advice boundaries.

settings.heading: Choose an available marketplace pathway
settings.text: Use the confirmed pathways below. Unfinished offers, finance, insurance and asset-sale routes should stay hidden until fully built and approved.

settings.title: Marketplace Terms
settings.text: Review the customer-facing terms that apply to marketplace pathways.

settings.title: Seller Compliance Toolkit
settings.text: View the active seller toolkit product for marketplace terms, listings, refunds and customer communications.

settings.title: Marketplace support
settings.text: Ask support to confirm whether a partner offer or marketplace pathway is available for your situation.

settings.heading: Partner offers
settings.text: Partner offers are subject to eligibility, commercial availability, partner terms and approval requirements. RBP does not provide financial, insurance or legal advice through marketplace listings.

settings.heading: What to confirm before acting
settings.text: Marketplace listings can change. Confirm the specific partner, eligibility, pricing, availability and terms before relying on an offer.

settings.title: Partner eligibility
settings.text: Some offers may require partner approval, business eligibility checks, location availability or customer tags.

settings.title: Commercial availability
settings.text: Pricing, inclusion, timing, availability and partner terms can change without every pathway being available to every customer.

settings.title: Advice boundaries
settings.text: Marketplace content is not financial, insurance, legal, tax or regulated professional advice.

settings.heading: Common marketplace questions
settings.text: Use these notes before acting on an offer or seller resource.

settings.question: Are all offers available to every customer?
settings.answer: No. Offers may depend on partner eligibility, location, timing, customer status, business details or partner approval.

settings.question: Does RBP provide financial, insurance or legal advice here?
settings.answer: No. Marketplace pathways and partner listings do not replace advice from an appropriately qualified provider.

settings.question: Where are finance, insurance or asset-sale offers?
settings.answer: Those pathways should remain hidden until they are complete, compliant and approved for publication.

settings.heading: Confirm the right marketplace pathway before acting
settings.text: Send the offer, product or seller context and support can route the request to the right next step.
